_meta.note: Narrative-compression reskins of the 3 slot-1 cells in batch_llm_002.json, per STORY_CELL_NARRATIVE_RULES.md. Overlay format (Spec V2 section 4 shape): only narrative fields are rewritten; the math spine (question/choices/correctIndex/hints/distractor_taxonomy) is untouched and stays in the base cell. Waterfowl's world_feedback object is normalized to a string here (rules section 5). Seeds the Cursor voice-reskin layer, which is not built yet.

reskins.storyContext: The logbook: the watch 30s slow at day 20, 90s slow at day 60. The astronomer asks William what the drift means.
reskins.world_feedback: 1.5 seconds more each day — now the drift can be subtracted out, day by day. A steady error is a correctable error.

minimal.storyContext: Interpret the drift rate: what does the slope mean?
minimal.world_feedback: (90−30)/(60−20) = 1.5 seconds more per day — a rate, with units, not a bare number.

reskins.note: Base storyContext ~600 chars (scene + dialogue + moral). Compressed to 112. The astronomer's verdict moved from preamble to feedback. The base question stem already restates both data points, so minimal.storyContext carries no numbers.

reskins.storyContext: The pond pole sits three rungs down the tenths ladder. Simon must log the depth as a decimal the night keeper can read.
reskins.world_feedback: 0.3 — the 10 names the size of each rung; only the count of 3 gets written. One relationship, one place, one number.

minimal.storyContext: Write three-tenths of a meter as a decimal.
minimal.world_feedback: 0.3. The denominator 10 is the place, not a digit to write.

reskins.note: Also fixes the world_feedback {correct, incorrect} object to a single string (rules section 5). Base storyContext compressed from ~200 to 119 chars.

reskins.storyContext: Thales' 6-cubit staff casts a 2-cubit shadow. The pyramid's shadow runs 90 cubits. The priests wait for its height.
reskins.world_feedback: 270 cubits — height is 3 times shadow for the staff, so 3 times shadow for the pyramid. The relationship did the measuring.

minimal.storyContext: Height is 3x shadow. Shadow is 90. Find the height.
minimal.world_feedback: 3 × 90 = 270. Ratios scale by multiplying, not by adding a difference.

reskins.note: Base storyContext ~370 chars compressed to 115. The priests' reaction stays in feedback where it lands after the work.
